summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quote Center page - all core functionality working correctly including page load, modal functionality, form validation, navigation, and mobile responsiveness
passed_tests: Quote Center page loads at /quote-center with 'Get Quotes' h1 title and subtitle
Dark red 'Request Immediate Call Back' button visible and styled correctly
2x2 grid displays all 4 quote cards (Home, Auto, Renter's, Commercial) with images and Get a Quote buttons
Modal opens with dark overlay when clicking callback button
Modal displays 'All Lines Busy?' title and 'Called, but missed us?' subtitle
Form contains all required fields (Full Name, Phone, Reason, Best Time)
Form validation prevents submission with empty required fields
Form submission with valid data shows 'Request Sent!' success message
Woman on phone image displays on desktop (right side of modal)
Modal close button (X) successfully closes modal
Header navigation: Home navigates to /, Insurance Tips to /insurance-tips, Quote Center to /quote-center
Mobile responsive: cards stack to 1 column at 375px viewport
Mobile navigation menu opens and functions correctly
Modal functionality works on mobile with woman image properly hidden
